hook: AI gave me a 47-step plan when I asked for help with one decision. 🙃
caption:
AI gave me a 47-step plan when I asked for help with one decision. 🙃

Here's what actually happened:

Me: "Should I take this freelance project?"

ChatGPT: *proceeds to outline a comprehensive decision-making framework, a pros/cons matrix, questions to ask the client, a rate calculator, advice on contract terms, and a 6-month career reflection exercise*

Babe. I needed a yes or a no.

The problem isn't the AI. The problem is that it doesn't know you're a decisive, gut-instinct person who needs ONE clear signal — not a consulting deck.

Some people want the full breakdown. They want every angle, every caveat, every possible outcome mapped out before they move. That's a completely valid thinking style.

But if that's not YOU — if you're someone who makes fast calls and then executes — getting the wall of options doesn't help. It creates noise.

The version of AI that actually works for you knows which one you are.

That's exactly what a BootFile does. It tells the AI: this person thinks in outcomes, not processes. Give them the signal, not the spreadsheet.

One setup. Every conversation after that — calibrated to how your brain actually works.

Which are you — do you want the full breakdown or just the bottom line? Drop it below. 👇
